item.title: Is This Combine Worth $2.7M?
item.description: A closer look at a combine priced at $2.7 million and asks the big question: is it worth it?

media:content.media:title: Is This Combine Worth $2.7M?
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a combine priced at $2.7 million and asks the big question: is it worth it?

item.title: Old Cheap Combine vs New Combine
item.description: An old cheap combine with a new expensive one, showing the differences in farm machinery and the practical side of harvest decisions.

media:content.media:title: Old Cheap Combine vs New Combine
media:content.media:description: An old cheap combine with a new expensive one, showing the differences in farm machinery and the practical side of harvest decisions.

item.title: How We Keep Crops Thriving All Summer
item.description: A look at the summer farm routine that helps keep crops growing strong through the heat

media:content.media:title: How We Keep Crops Thriving All Summer
media:content.media:description: A look at the summer farm routine that helps keep crops growing strong through the heat

item.title: Farm Girl Tractor Surprise
item.description: A surprise moment involving a tractor unfolds during daily farm work, capturing equipment use and life around the farm in a short reel.

media:content.media:title: Farm Girl Tractor Surprise
media:content.media:description: A surprise moment involving a tractor unfolds during daily farm work, capturing equipment use and life around the farm in a short reel.

item.title: Pivot Maintenance on the Farm
item.description: Pivot maintenance, one of the tougher jobs on the farm, with steady work and a practical look at keeping things running.

media:content.media:title: Pivot Maintenance on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Pivot maintenance, one of the tougher jobs on the farm, with steady work and a practical look at keeping things running.

item.title: My Hired Man Left the Farm
item.description: A simple farm update about a big change in the operation. What happened, and how daily work keeps moving forward.

media:content.media:title: My Hired Man Left the Farm
media:content.media:description: A simple farm update about a big change in the operation. What happened, and how daily work keeps moving forward.

item.title: Gearbox Issues in the Cornfield
item.description: Laura works through gearbox issues in the cornfield, keeping the day moving with a practical, hands-on farm approach.

media:content.media:title: Gearbox Issues in the Cornfield
media:content.media:description: Laura works through gearbox issues in the cornfield, keeping the day moving with a practical, hands-on farm approach.

item.title: Hot Cornfields and Broken Pivots
item.description: A straightforward day on the farm with hot cornfields and a broken pivot, showing the steady work and problem solving that keep things moving.

media:content.media:title: Hot Cornfields and Broken Pivots
media:content.media:description: A straightforward day on the farm with hot cornfields and a broken pivot, showing the steady work and problem solving that keep things moving.

item.title: Skid-Steer Gets Stuck by the Creek
item.description: A real farm moment as a skid-steer gets stuck by the creek, showing the teamwork and problem-solving that come with daily life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Skid-Steer Gets Stuck by the Creek
media:content.media:description: A real farm moment as a skid-steer gets stuck by the creek, showing the teamwork and problem-solving that come with daily life on the farm.
